session.user:
Run the following commands and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
1. `uv run ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/repo_resolution.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/log_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py`
2. `uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/repo_resolution.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/log_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py`
3. `uv run ty check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/repo_resolution.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/log_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/close_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/duplicate_check_cmd.py`
Report the exact output of each command including exit codes.
